title: Air France Flight 447
impact: Aircraft crashed into the Atlantic during cruise.
cause: Pitot probe icing led to unreliable airspeed; crew response and stall recognition were major investigation findings.
lesson: Automation awareness, unreliable airspeed handling, manual flying and upset recovery are critical.

title: British Airways Flight 38
impact: Aircraft landed short of the runway at London Heathrow.
cause: Ice crystals restricted fuel flow through the fuel-oil heat exchanger.
lesson: Cold-weather fuel system behaviour and approach energy monitoring are important safety lessons.

title: Qantas Flight 32
impact: Uncontained engine failure occurred after departure from Singapore.
cause: A defect in an oil feed pipe led to oil leakage, fire and turbine disc failure.
lesson: Crew resource management, system knowledge and disciplined checklist handling prevented disaster.
